name: Fat-Free Thousand Island Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 egg whites, hard cooked and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Add celery, bell peppers, and onions to the work bowl.
2. Pulse the mixture until finely chopped.
3. Add mayonnaise, chili sauce, paprika, salt, and egg whites to the work bowl.
4. Continue pulsing until all ingredients are well mixed.
